description_long: This house consists of two modern, boxy structures separated by a central tree, with one building featuring a flat roof and a carport covered by a translucent awning. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of light wood paneling and smooth gray surfaces, giving a contemporary appearance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, allowing ample natural light into the interiors. The property includes a paved area and a small patch of greenery near the carport, enhancing its urban residential feel. The flat roofs and clean lines emphasize a minimalist, modern architectural style. The overall layout suggests a duplex or two closely situated single-family homes sharing a lot.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed houses with wood and gray exteriors, separated by a tree and featuring large windows and a carport with a translucent awning.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, the central tree, the carport with translucent awning, and the paved entry area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, greenery, and the alignment of the two houses with trees in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the houses, the central tree, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roofs, window placements, and the separation between the two houses.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door under a flat overhang, with a paved approach and a carport covered by a translucent awning.
